title: Looking for Monday.com Specialists to Join My Team
excerpt:
Hello! 
I am looking for experienced freelancers to join my team in providing Monday.com solutions to my current network of clients. If you have expertise in creating custom dashboards, integrating with third party apps,…

posts.author: JackM (Jack Michelson )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I am looking for experienced freelancers to join my team in providing Monday.com solutions to my current network of clients. If you have expertise in creating custom dashboards, integrating with third party apps, automating processes, generating reports, and building workflows, I would love to discuss the opportunity further with you.

If you are interested, please take a few minutes to fill out this form: Monday CRM Specialist Application

Thank you and have a great day!

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JackM ,

I am a certified monday professional, let me know if you’re still looking for the same.

You can also reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib
